name: The Diamond ATM
description_short: Atlanta-based luxury pawn shop and precious metals buyer with two locations offering cash for jewelry, watches, designer goods, and gold items. Rated 4.9/5 stars with over 1,000 customer reviews.
description_long:
The Gold ATM is a luxury pawn shop and precious metals buyer operating in the Atlanta metropolitan area with two physical locations in Wildwood and Lenox. The company positions itself as a high-end alternative to traditional pawn shops, specializing in luxury goods and fine items rather than general merchandise. Their business model centers on purchasing or pawning valuable items from customers who need immediate cash.

The Gold ATM buys a focused range of luxury items including gold jewelry, designer handbags (particularly Chanel), Rolex and fine watches, loose diamonds, solid gold items, and designer jewelry. Rather than operating as a traditional ATM or cash access point despite the name, the company functions as a collateral-based lending and goods-buying service. Customers can either sell items outright or use them as collateral for pawn loans.

The company distinguishes itself through its emphasis on luxury goods valuation and customer reputation. Their 4.9/5 star rating across over 1,000 reviews suggests strong customer satisfaction and trustworthiness in a category often associated with skepticism. They maintain convenient hours (10am-5pm most days) at two upscale shopping centers and provide a phone appointment scheduling option, suggesting a more white-glove service approach than typical pawn shops.

However, as a pawn shop, this business fundamentally involves high-risk financial transactions. Customers should understand that pawning items means putting personal valuables at risk, pawn loans typically carry high interest rates (not disclosed on the website), and there's no guarantee of favorable valuations. The service is best suited for customers with genuine luxury items who understand the pawn lending process and need immediate cash despite the financial costs involved.
address: 3500 Lenox Rd NE Suite 1500, Atlanta, GA 30326

company_info.headquarters: 3500 Lenox Rd NE Suite 1500, Atlanta, GA 30326

pros: High customer satisfaction with 4.9/5 star rating and over 1,000 reviews
Specializes in luxury goods, suggesting expertise in high-value item appraisal
Two convenient locations in upscale Atlanta shopping centers (Windy Ridge and Lenox)
Flexible service options including both outright sales and pawn loans for the same items
Extended Saturday hours (10am-5pm) at Wildwood location for weekend access
Appointment scheduling available by phone, reducing wait times
Handles diverse luxury categories including watches, jewelry, designer bags, and precious metals
cons: No pricing transparency or interest rate information disclosed on website for pawn loans
Limited hours Monday-Friday at Lenox location (closed Tuesday and Saturday)
Company name 'The Gold ATM' is misleading—not an actual ATM or cash access point
Requires customers to provide valuables as collateral, creating risk of item loss if loan cannot be repaid
No information about loan terms, repayment periods, or fees on the public-facing website
best_for: Individuals with luxury items (jewelry, watches, designer bags) who need immediate cash
People in financial emergencies seeking collateral-based loans rather than unsecured personal loans
Atlanta-area residents with high-value precious metals or designer goods to sell outright
Luxury goods owners seeking fair market valuations from specialized appraisers
diagnosis: The Gold ATM is best for Atlanta-area consumers with genuine luxury items who understand pawn lending and need fast cash access. The critical caveat is that pawning items involves high-interest debt and risk of losing valuables if loans aren't repaid on time; customers should only use this service as a last resort and fully understand the terms before pledging valuable possessions.
services: Designer handbag purchasing (Chanel, other luxury brands)
Solid gold item evaluation and purchase
